edge_cases.scenario_name: Single vendor matches - Mountain states only
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Return at least 1 result, no errors or crashes
edge_cases.notes: Mountain Tech Industries - limited vendors cover CO/UT/WY combination

edge_cases.scenario_name: Very low score - but still eligible
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Low-scoring vendors still returned with human review flag
edge_cases.notes: Vendors scoring 50-60 should appear with strong human review warnings

edge_cases.expected_behavior: Deterministic ordering (by vendor_id or other tiebreaker)
edge_cases.notes: Two vendors with identical scores should have consistent rank order

edge_cases.expected_behavior: All results should have stale_vendor_data warning
edge_cases.notes: If all vendor data is >180 days old, all should be flagged

edge_cases.scenario_name: Missing required data in buyer request
edge_cases.notes: Buyer request missing claim_type_needed or states_needed

edge_cases.expected_behavior: Return empty results or clear error message
edge_cases.notes: Non-existent buyer ID should not crash the system

edge_cases.scenario_name: Buyer requests very rare claim type
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Few or no matches returned with explanation
edge_cases.notes: Occupational accident or professional liability may have limited vendors

edge_cases.expected_behavior: Weights adjust but sum to 100, results stable
edge_cases.notes: When all priorities are critical, relative importance still matters
When nothing is important, vendors should score similarly

edge_cases.expected_behavior: Return empty results with clear explanation
edge_cases.notes: If excluded_vendors list contains all matches, return no results

edge_cases.scenario_name: Multi-state buyer with no vendor coverage
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Return partial matches or empty with explanation
edge_cases.notes: Requesting states like HI + AK + rare combinations

edge_cases.expected_behavior: Graceful error handling, no data corruption
edge_cases.notes: Simulate DB unavailable - should return error, not crash

edge_cases.scenario_name: Match results with NULL values in key fields
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Handle NULL gracefully, apply appropriate penalties
edge_cases.notes: Vendors with NULL in satisfaction_score or reporting_score
Some vendors may have no reason codes if all fields missing
Ensure no negative scores or scores >100 due to calculation errors

tests: Test with score at exact threshold values (70, 80, 90)
Malformed JSON in reason_codes or risk_flags
All vendors with stale data (>180 days)
Vendors with NULL in critical fields
Cost priority = 5 with all high-priced vendors
Run validation on all 15 buyers sequentially
Check for memory leaks over 1000 runs

implementation_notes.test_harness: Create test_edge_cases.py to programmatically test edge cases
implementation_notes.mocking: Use unittest.mock to simulate DB failures and data issues
implementation_notes.assertions: Check for: no crashes, appropriate error messages, data integrity
implementation_notes.documentation: Document expected vs actual behavior for each edge case
